Motorcycle Touring Packing List

Everything you need — nothing you don't

🛡️ Riding Gear

  • ☐ Helmet + Pinlock
  • ☐ Jacket (waterproof)
  • ☐ Trousers (armoured)
  • ☐ Boots (waterproof)
  • ☐ Gloves (2 pairs)
  • ☐ Base layers x3
  • ☐ Neck tube / balaclava

🔧 Tools & Spares

  • ☐ Puncture repair kit
  • ☐ Tyre pressure gauge
  • ☐ Multi-tool
  • ☐ Cable ties & duct tape
  • ☐ Chain lube
  • ☐ Spare fuses
  • ☐ Jump starter / USB charger

⛺ Camping (if applicable)

  • ☐ Tent (lightweight)
  • ☐ Sleeping bag
  • ☐ Roll mat
  • ☐ Stove + fuel
  • ☐ Mug & spork
  • ☐ Head torch
  • ☐ Dry bags

📱 Tech & Navigation

  • ☐ Phone mount
  • ☐ Sat nav / GPS
  • ☐ Power bank
  • ☐ USB cables
  • ☐ Intercom
  • ☐ Action camera
  • ☐ Paper map backup

🩹 Safety & First Aid

  • ☐ First aid kit
  • ☐ Hi-vis vest
  • ☐ Disc lock + reminder
  • ☐ Bike cover
  • ☐ Insurance docs
  • ☐ Breakdown cover card
  • ☐ ICE contact card

👕 Off-Bike Clothes

  • ☐ Casual trousers / jeans
  • ☐ T-shirts x2
  • ☐ Trainers / shoes
  • ☐ Lightweight rain jacket
  • ☐ Swim shorts (wild swimming!)
  • ☐ Warm fleece
